entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tasks` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `location` TEXT NOT NULL, `assigneeId` TEXT NOT NULL, `priority` TEXT NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `dueAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `syncStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_tasks_assigneeId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_tasks_assigneeId` ON `tasks` (`assigneeId`)

indices.name: index_tasks_syncStatus
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_tasks_syncStatus` ON `tasks` (`syncStatus`)

indices.name: index_tasks_dueAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_tasks_dueAt` ON `tasks` (`dueAt`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reports` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `taskId` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `details` TEXT NOT NULL, `photoUris` TEXT NOT NULL, `latitude` REAL, `longitude` REAL, `signatureUri` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `syncStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `customFields` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_reports_taskId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_reports_taskId` ON `reports` (`taskId`)

indices.name: index_reports_syncStatus
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_reports_syncStatus` ON `reports` (`syncStatus`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sync_queue` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityId` TEXT NOT NULL, `operation` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_sync_queue_status
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_queue_status` ON `sync_queue` (`status`)

indices.name: index_sync_queue_entityId_operation
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_queue_entityId_operation` ON `sync_queue` (`entityId`, `operation`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `comments` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `taskId` TEXT NOT NULL, `authorId` TEXT NOT NULL, `authorName` TEXT NOT NULL, `body` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `syncStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
